clientScopes.name: mcp:read
clientScopes.description: Read-only SOC tools and SELECT against the operational DB.

clientScopes.name: mcp:write
clientScopes.description: Mutating but non-destructive: UPDATE/INSERT/DELETE rows, mocked host/credential controls.

clientScopes.name: mcp:admin
clientScopes.description: Destructive DDL: DROP / CREATE / ALTER / TRUNCATE. Reserve for break-glass scenarios.

clients.name: MCP Server (resource server)
clients.description: The MCP server uses this client's secret to call Keycloak's token-introspection endpoint when validating bearer tokens from agents.

clients.name: Remediation agent
clients.description: Service-account client used by the Remediation agent. Granted mcp:read + mcp:write at the realm; deliberately NOT granted mcp:admin so the destructive demo fails when the agent tries DROP TABLE.

clients.name: Threat-Intel agent
clients.description: Service-account client for the Threat-Intel agent. mcp:read only at the OAuth layer; capabilities.json restricts it to the SOC investigation tools.

clients.name: Triage agent
clients.description: Service-account client for the Triage planner. Used to call other agents over A2A; identity-based authorization is enforced by each receiver's agent-card.json.

clients.name: Comms agent (resource server)
clients.description: Comms uses this client's secret to call Keycloak's introspection endpoint when validating bearer tokens from incoming A2A calls.
